title: Channel Explorer
description: Time-series visualization of instrument channel data by session

list.name: channel
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT source_method FROM channels WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY source_method

targets.rawSql: SELECT received_at AS time, value, session_id FROM channels WHERE source_method = '${channel}' AND value IS NOT NULL AND received_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' ORDER BY time

SELECT session_id, count(*) AS samples, round(avg(value), 4) AS mean, round(min(value), 4) AS min_val, round(max(value), 4) AS max_val, round(stddev(value), 4) AS stddev, min(received_at) AS first_sample, max(received_at) AS last_sample FROM channels WHERE source_method = '${channel}' AND value IS NOT NULL AND received_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' GROUP BY session_id ORDER BY first_sample DESC

SELECT source_method, count(*) AS samples, count(DISTINCT session_id) AS sessions, round(avg(value), 4) AS mean, round(min(value), 4) AS min_val, round(max(value), 4) AS max_val, round(stddev(value), 4) AS stddev FROM channels WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND received_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' GROUP BY source_method ORDER BY samples DESC
SELECT date_trunc('hour', received_at) AS time, source_method, count(*) AS samples FROM channels WHERE received_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2
